issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not a valid trigger type. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn
GiveKeyword 'Blocker' with duration 'EndOfTurn' is likely incorrect. Blocker keyword typically should persist until end of opponent's turn or be Permanent. Verify card text for proper duration.
